title: Quality Spec Frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of specs/quality.md. StandardsAgent reads these fields at Gate 2 to verify that minimum coverage and lint thresholds are defined before allowing the project to progress.

version.description: Semantic version of this spec document (e.g. '1.0.0').

coverage_gate.description: Global minimum test coverage percentage required to pass CI (0–100). Maps to --cov-fail-under in pytest-cov.

lint_gate.description: Linting tool enforced in CI. Must be one of the supported PIV/OAC linters.

test_framework.description: Primary test framework used by the project (e.g. 'pytest', 'jest', 'vitest').

sca_tool.description: Optional Software Composition Analysis tool used for dependency vulnerability scanning (e.g. 'pip-audit', 'safety', 'npm-audit').

validated.description: Whether the frontmatter has been validated by tools/validate-specs.py.

validated_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the last successful validation.
